title: Toolsmith's Arsenal
description: Toolsmith's Arsenal mod offers you many powerful new tools in vanilla style!
body:
📖 About:

Expand your path in Minecraft with The Toolsmith's Arsenal mod! Get a set of the most advanced tools and blades to help you in mining and combat. Equip yourself with the best gear and pave your way to greatness in the blocky world of Minecraft.

 🔧️Features:


Sculk tools: These tools provide additional experience when breaking blocks. This can be useful for players who are looking to quickly increase their experience level in the game.

Magma Tools: When mining a block with a magma tool, if the player holds down the SHIFT key, the block can be automatically melted down, saving time and providing the final material immediately.

Emerald, Amethyst, and Copper Tools: Each of these types of tools has unique characteristics that may differ from the standard tools in Minecraft.

Sculk ingot drops with a small chance when breaking sculk blocks, Magma ingot drops with the same chance when destroying Magama blocks.

Additional Crafting and Recipes: The mod can also add new recipes to create tools and other items from new materials.


⏳Future plans:

Ender tools, Katanas, Battle hammers, Daggers, Multi tools
